text: I tried to cancel an appointment from the 'My Appointments' page earlier today. When I clicked the cancel button the page reloaded but the appointment still showed as confirmed. I tried again and it finally disappeared, but I’m not confident it actually canceled properly.
I'm having trouble with the reschedule feature. When I click reschedule it opens the form, I select a new date and time, and then click save, but nothing changes in the appointment list afterwards.

Earlier I attempted to book an appointment and the page returned an error after submitting the form. When I refreshed the page the appointment appeared, so I'm not sure if the booking actually failed or succeeded.
The appointments page is behaving oddly. Sometimes when I open it the table loads empty for a moment and then suddenly my appointments appear.
I tried to submit a help request explaining a problem with my booking, but after pressing send the page just refreshed and didn’t show any confirmation message.
When I try to reschedule an appointment the dropdown menus appear but they don’t always keep the values I selected.
I attempted to book an appointment with Dr. Eve. The booking seemed to work but the status stayed as 'pending' for a long time before eventually switching to confirmed.
I tried paying for an appointment but got a payment error message. I refreshed the page and tried again and the second attempt worked.
The booking page sometimes resets my selections when I change the doctor field which is pretty annoying.
I attempted to cancel an appointment yesterday evening and it took two attempts before the appointment finally disappeared from the list.
The appointments page occasionally shows my appointment twice until I refresh.
I tried submitting the help form twice because I wasn’t sure if the first submission worked.
The reschedule feature seems unreliable. I had to try several times before the change actually saved.
